name: Bendigo And Adelaide Bank Limited
analysis: BEN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 20% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$10.4800, stop A$9.8505, target A$11.5879 (1.76:1) — then trail it.
